verses.text: Zion mualtungah peengkul tum un la, Pasian' mual siangtho tungah pataukohna tum un. Topa ni hong naita ahih manin gamsung mi khempeuh lau ta uh hen

Tua ni pen a mial, a lungzin'huai, meii kai-in khuazin' ni ahi ding hi. Mualtunga meiipi kai bangin simzawh lohin kauphe honpi hong leeng muaimuai hi. Cikmahin hih bang thu omngei nailo a, cikmah ciangin zong omkik nawnlo ding hi

A madawkte, a haltum thei meikuang bang a, a nungdalte, mei-am alh tawh kibang hi. Amau hong tun' ma-in gamsung teng khempeuh Eden huan a bang hi a, amau' khit ciangin a kinusiacip keugaw gam tawh kibang hi. Amaute kiang pan a suakta bangmah omlo hi
Amaute' mel sakolte tawh kibang a, sakol galkapte bangin a tai uh hi
Mualtung tengah a tuan zuazua laitakun sakol leeng ging zuazuate leh gamlaka lopa omte kangin a puak ziazua tawh kibang uh a, galsim dingin a kithawi, galkap honpi tawh kibang uh hi
Amaute hong pai ciangin mi khempeuh lau uh a, a maitang uh daanggawp hi
Galte bangin hong sim uh a, galkapte bangin kulh tungah hong kah uh hi. A vekpi-in tangtakin mai hong nawt uh a, a hong heempai kuamah omlo hi
Amau' lampi san ciat hong tawn uh a, a kiphukha kuamah omlo uh hi. Amau mah dalna dingin a kibawlte hong phugawp uh a, khawl hetloin hong paisuak uh hi
Khuapi sung hong kiden'na uh a, kulh tung khawngah tai zaizai uh hi. Inn tung khawngah kahto ngeingai uh a, gutate bangin tawletah hong lut uh hi
Amau' mai-ah leipi ling a, vanpi nangawn ling damdam hi. Ni leh kha zong mialta a, aksite zong taang nawnlo hi

Ama mihonpite tam mahmah uh ahih manin amaute thu pia-in a mai uhah Topa awng a, ama thupiakna bangin a semte hat mahmah uh hi. Topa' ni ding kihtakhuai mahmah ahih manin a thuakzo ding kua om ding ahi hiam?
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu mahmah nangawnin lungsim tak tawh kisik kikin, an tangin, kapin, thumna tawh kei kiangah hong paikik un

Na dah taktakna uh lungkhamna tawh langsak un la, na puante uh a balkek bek hi kei un,” hong ci hi. Topa, note' Pasian kiangah ciahkik un. Amah migi mahmahin hehpihna a nei hi a, a lungduai-in hong huh nuam tawntung a, gim hong pialoin hong maisak nuam tawntung hi
Topa, eite' Pasian in a lungsim hong kheelin an hauhsakna tawh thupha hong piakha ding hi. Tua hi leh ama tungah an leh leenggahzu tawh biakna i pia thei ding hi
Zion mual tungah peengkul tumin an tan'na ding thu pia un la, biak kikhopna khat nei un

Mite kaikhawm un la, amaute sian'suah un. A khangham mite sam un la, naupangte zong kaikhawm un. Nawine lai naungekte zong paipih un. A kiteng cil nungak leh tangvalte nangawn in a omna uh nusia-in hong pai uh hen

Topa' na a sem siampite, biakinn sung innlim leh biakna tau kikalah kapin thu ngen uh hen la, “ Topa aw, na mite hong hehpih in. Minam dangte in, ‘Na Pasian uh koi-ah om ahi hiam,’ ci-in kote hong simmawhsak kei in. Amaute' nuihsatin kote hong omsak kei in,” ci uh hen.
Tua ciangin Topa in ama leitang hong donin, ama mite hong hehpih hi
Topa in ama mite' thungetna dawng a, “Tu-in note tungah an, leenggahzu leh sathau ka hong pia a, na kham takun na ne ding uh hi. Minam dangte' simmawhin na om nawn kei ding uh hi

Leilu lam gam panin a hong pai mite, note kiang panin sehnel gamah ka hawlkhia ding a, a madawkte uh nisuahna tuipi sungah khia-in, a nungdalte uh nitumna tuipi sungah ka khia ding a, amaute in note tungah hong bawlna hangin a luanghawmte uh uihgawp ding hi
“Lote aw, lau nawn kei un la, lungdam kipakin om un. Topa in note-a' dingin a lianpi hong bawlsak zo hi
Ganhingte aw, lau nawn kei un. Gamsung tengah lo nota a, singkungte gahta-in, theigah leh leenggah tampi a om hi
“Zion mite aw, kipak un la, Topa na Pasian uh tungah lungdam ta un. Note in an na hauh theihna dingun nidanga bangin khuapi guah, tuk guah leh phalbi guah, a hoihbekzah hong zusak hi
Na ancilna phual uh an tawh kidim ding a, na koihna uh umlebeel khempeuh leenggahzu leh sathau tawh kidim ding hi
Note a hong sim dingin ka hong sawl kauphe honpi, a tuan kauphe, a susia kauphe, a pettan kauphe, hih ka galkap honte in a hong neksak kum sungin a piang ding teng tang kong piakik ding hi
Tu-in nek ding tampi nei-in na gil uh vah ding a, note-a' dingin a lamdang nate a hong bawlsak Topa na Pasian uh na phat ding uh hi. Tua ciangin ka mite hong kisimmawh nawnlo ding hi
Tua ciangin no Israel mite lakah kei ka omna thu, keimah Topa pen note' Pasian ka hihna thu, kei simloh kuamah dang a omlohna na thei ding uh hi. Ka mite hong kisimmawh nawnlo ding hi.
“Tua khit ciangin mi khempeuh tungah ka kha ka sung ding a, na puteekte un mang manin na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh hi
Tua hun ciangin nasem numei leh nasem pasalte tung nangawnah ka kha ka sung ding hi
“Tua ciangin vantung leh leitungah hilhkholhna lim ahi, sisan kiluan'sakna, meikatna leh meikhu lompi hong om ding hi
Topa' ni, tua a lauhuai hun a hong tun' ma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi

Ahi zongin Topa' tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. Topa' gensa bangmahin Zion Mual leh Jerusalem khuasungah a suakta mi om ding uh hi. Topa in a teel mite, suakta ding uh hi.
